description: Deterministic prefix-safe starter policy. Every numeric threshold is provisional and must not be presented as calibrated agronomic truth.

onset_rules.watch: LOW-MED or higher on 2 of 3 observed days, or one fresh/aging medium response
onset_rules.active: MED-HIGH or higher on 2 of 3, or aligned fresh/aging medium response plus same-driver LOW-MED-or-higher pressure
onset_rules.severe: one HIGH day or one aligned severe response
